displayName: Azure Static Web Apps should use the Standard SKU
description: Audits Azure Static Web Apps that are deployed on the Free tier. Standard tier is a prerequisite for enterprise security features including private endpoints, enterprise-grade CDN, and managed identity integrations. Set the effect to Deny to block creation or update of Free-tier apps, or Audit to report non-compliant resources without blocking.

metadata.description: Audit logs a compliance warning without blocking; Deny blocks the request; Disabled turns the policy off.
